channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Truecaller now lets you hang up on scammers — on behalf of your family
item.description: Caller identity platform Truecaller recently launched a new feature that lets one person become an admin of a family group, get alerts about fraud calls received by other members, and even end a call on their behalf if they suspect a family member might get scammed. The company, which has over 450 million users, first […]

item.title: Cornbread Mafia review: True crime meets stoner comedy in this outrageous documentary
item.description: True crime meets stoner comedy in outrageous documentary "Cornbread Mafia," which is playing at SXSW. Review.

item.title: A Safe Distance review: Dont overlook this sexy, sapphic thriller
item.description: 'A Safe Distance' review: Influenced by Patricia Highsmith, this sexy, sapphic thriller is the directorial debut of Gloria Mercer.

item.title: Someone tested the MacBook Neo’s gaming chops, and the results ranged from ‘miracle’ scores to ‘completely unplayable’
item.description: The MacBook Neo performs surprisingly well in some Mac games, while others remain ‘completely unplayable.’

item.title: I tried Claude's new interactive visuals feature — and it’s one of the most fun AI tricks I’ve seen
item.description: Claude’s new interactive visuals feature lets the chatbot generate dynamic diagrams and tools inside chat.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for March 13, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for March 13, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for March 13, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1728 on March 13 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
